scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @alice/shared build && concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "blue,green" --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @alice/shared build && pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter server lint && pnpm --filter client lint && pnpm --filter shared lint
